name: 6″ Retrofit Recessed Downlight – 15W – 5CCT – ETL
description: Features: Energy-Efficient Performance: Run just 15W, with integrated bright-light emissions, to keep it economically cheap. High Lumen Output: 1200 lumens of highly visible light for greater visibility. 5 Adjust According to Suitable Ambiance: For any ambiance, switch to 2700K, 3000K, 3500K, 4000K, or 5000K. Smooth Dimming: Compatible with 120V Triac dimmers for flicker-free, seamless brightness control. Wide Beam Angle: 100° beam spread ensures even and consistent lighting across larger areas. Superior Color Accuracy: CRI >90 delivers true-to-life color rendering for vivid detail. Easy Installation: Includes an E26 adapter for fast and tool-free setup in standard sockets. Modern Design: Features a sleek white trim for a clean, contemporary ceiling finish. Certified Quality: ETL Listed and Energy Star Certified for trusted safety and performance. Versatile Use: Ideal for living rooms, kitchens, bedrooms, hallways, offices, and retail spaces.
short_desc: Specifications: Wattage: 15W Lumen Output: 1200 lm Color Temperature: 2700K / 3000K / 3500K / 4000K / 5000K (Selectable) Input Voltage: 120VAC Power Factor: ≥0.9 Efficacy: 80 lm/W CRI: 80+ Beam Angle: 100° Dimmable: Yes, Triac-compatible Operating Temperature: -20°C to 45°C Housing Material: Aluminum Housing Color: White IP Rating: Damp Rated Lens Type: Frosted Certifications: ETL, Energy Star LED Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 3 Years
